03

Featured Work

01
📊 Data Visualization

Retail Sales Dataset Analysis with Power BI

Developed an interactive dashboard to visualize sales performance data. Created charts to identify key sales drivers. Implemented DAX for data manipulation, aggregation, filtering and exploration.

Power BIDAXData VisualizationDashboard
02
📈 Research & Analysis

Analysis of Government Expenditure on Economic Growth in Nigeria (1990–2020)

Gathered data from CBN, NBS, and World Bank. Conducted regression analysis using SPSS. Developed multiple regression models isolating effects across health, education, defense, and administrative expenditures.

SPSSRegression AnalysisWorld Bank DataResearch Writing
